source.name: 0xnbk/resume-ats-score-v1-en
source.construction: Short resume and job fragments were manually selected, de-identified, and lightly normalized. Whole documents, names, employers, contact details, and locations are not included.
source.limitations: The source corpus is public and its ATS labels are algorithmic. These case labels assess sentence-level evidence support only, not hiring outcomes or candidate quality.

cases.requirement: Build and maintain SQL data pipelines using ETL or ELT workflows.
cases.evidence: Built SQL ETL workflows that integrated data from several operational systems.

cases.requirement: At least eight years of Java and JEE development experience is required.
cases.evidence: Developed Java, Spring MVC, and J2EE services for nine years.

cases.requirement: Deploy services with AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, and continuous integration tools.
cases.evidence: Deployed containerized services to AWS with Kubernetes, Docker, and GitHub Actions.

cases.requirement: Advanced Excel skills including PivotTables and VLOOKUP are required.
cases.evidence: Prepared financial reports with Excel PivotTables and VLOOKUP.

cases.requirement: Provide customer service and manage sales relationships.
cases.evidence: Managed customer relationships and sales accounts while maintaining positive client feedback.

cases.requirement: Develop Python and SQL services with REST APIs.
cases.evidence: Developed Python and SQL applications and implemented RESTful APIs.

cases.requirement: Coordinate project plans, timelines, and stakeholder communication.
cases.evidence: Coordinated project schedules, documented milestones, and presented updates to stakeholders.

cases.requirement: Clearly communicate platform capabilities and limitations to customers.
cases.evidence: Presented technical constraints and implementation options to client stakeholders.

cases.requirement: Build production data pipelines.
cases.evidence: Automated ETL workflows for multi-source operational data.

cases.requirement: Create business intelligence dashboards for recurring reporting.
cases.evidence: Created Tableau visualizations and recurring management reports.

cases.requirement: At least eight years of Java and JEE development experience is required.
cases.evidence: Lists Java, Spring MVC, and J2EE among technical skills.

cases.requirement: Deploy cloud services with AWS, Kubernetes, and Docker.
cases.evidence: Prepared monthly accounting reconciliations and Excel reports.

cases.requirement: Build SQL data integration and ETL workflows.
cases.evidence: Provided customer service and maintained sales relationships.

cases.requirement: Design solutions on the Salesforce platform.
cases.evidence: Analyzed research data with Python and statistical methods.

cases.requirement: Perform accounting and financial analysis.
cases.evidence: Developed Java backend services and database integrations.

cases.requirement: Deploy machine learning models to production services.
cases.evidence: Presented historical research findings to a student seminar.

cases.requirement: A four-year degree in computer science is required.
cases.evidence: Lists software development and organizational skills.

cases.requirement: Current work authorization is required.
cases.evidence: Available to begin work immediately.

cases.requirement: Five years of production software delivery experience is required.
cases.evidence: Completed an academic software project using Python.

cases.requirement: Demonstrate excellent written and oral communication skills.
cases.evidence: Used Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook.

cases.requirement: Operate Kubernetes and Docker-based deployment environments.
cases.evidence: Used Git for source control on a small project.

cases.requirement: Build Tableau dashboards for executive reporting.
cases.evidence: Worked with data in several assignments.

cases.requirement: Own project budgets and coordinate delivery schedules.
cases.evidence: Coordinated delivery schedules for a small team.

cases.requirement: Use SQL, NoSQL databases, and continuous integration tools.
cases.evidence: Built recurring SQL reports from a relational database.
